title: Chore: Upgrade linting configuration
original_text: Upgraded the linting configuration to enforce stricter code quality standards. Updated .flake8rc to increase max line length to 100 and enable more plugins. Added pyproject.toml with black configuration for consistent formatting. Configured mypy with strict type checking. Added pre-commit hooks to run linters automatically. Updated documentation with contribution guidelines. Result: linting passes on all files.
expected_subject: chore(lint): upgrade linting configuration and standards
expected_body_lines: - Configure mypy with strict type checking
- Add pre-commit hooks for automatic linting
- Validation: linting passes on all files
expected_command: git commit -m "chore(lint): upgrade linting configuration and standards"
